content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Clean review. The failure reconciliation implementation is correct, robust, and well-tested. The new failure_reconciliation.rs module properly records BeadFailed journal events, counts attempts across retries, escalates to NeedsOperator after MAX_RETRIES (3), and is idempotent. Beads are never closed on failure. Controller state transitions are properly extended (Blocked→Running, Blocked→Reconciling) to support the retry path. The stale started_at guard in fs.rs prevents race conditions with same-run-id retries. All 9 unit tests in failure_reconciliation.rs, 21 CLI sync tests, and 3 daemon_loop failure reconciliation tests pass. Clippy is clean with -D warnings.

## Amendments

None.
